narrative:
Newton Township has 1,222 registered voters, with 61.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a clear Republican lean of 9.0 percentage points.
